description: Infrastructure, deployment, monitoring, and system reliability
prompt:
## Task:
Set up development and production infrastructure, implement CI/CD pipelines, configure comprehensive monitoring and alerting, and ensure system reliability and operational excellence.

## Requirements:
1. Create Docker and docker-compose configurations for all services (PostgreSQL, Redis, Qdrant, FastAPI)
2. Implement CI/CD pipelines with automated testing and deployment
3. Set up monitoring with Prometheus and Grafana dashboards
4. Configure centralized logging with structured log aggregation
5. Implement health checks, auto-scaling, and self-healing mechanisms
6. Design disaster recovery and backup strategies
7. Optimize infrastructure cost and resource utilization
8. Document all infrastructure setup and operational procedures

## Output:
Dockerfiles, docker-compose.yml, CI/CD pipeline configs, monitoring dashboards, alert rules, deployment scripts, infrastructure diagrams, and operational runbooks.
